location.title: Your location

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

taskDrawer.canceledNotice: This task is canceled. It stays here as a record for both sides.
taskDrawer.activeNotice: This task is active and visible to both you and the worker.
taskDrawer.employerOnlyEdit: Only the employer can edit a task.
taskDrawer.restoreHint: Restoring moves it back to To-Do.
taskDrawer.cancelHint: Canceling keeps a record for both sides.
taskDrawer.visibleToBoth: Visible to both you and the other party
taskDrawer.readOnlyNotice: This job is {status} — tasks are read-only.
taskDrawer.remaining: {count, plural, =0 {Nothing left to do} other {# remaining}}
taskDrawer.neverDeletedNotice: Nothing is ever deleted — canceled tasks stay for reference.
taskDrawer.finishRemainingFirst: Finish or cancel remaining tasks first.
taskDrawer.reportIssueHint: Something not right? Let us know.
taskDrawer.confirmCancelJob: Are you sure you want to cancel this job? This action cannot be undone.
taskDrawer.remainingTasksWarning: Finish or cancel the {count, plural, one {# remaining task} other {# remaining tasks}} first.

individualForm.serviceDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe what is included, what you bring, and what kind of home or client this service is best for.
individualForm.validateAreaRequired: Please select an area of service
individualForm.validatePriceInvalid: Price must be a valid non-negative number.
individualForm.previewDialogDescription: Review the card before saving. You can go back and edit anything that does not feel right.
individualForm.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this service? This action cannot be undone.
individualForm.fetchWorkersFailed: Failed to fetch workers. Please try again.

editProfile.pleaseLogIn: Please log in to edit your profile
editProfile.minAgeError: You must be at least {age} to work in Rwanda
editProfile.usernameFormat: Use 3-30 lowercase letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens
editProfile.cityRequiredLocation: City is required when adding a location
editProfile.cityRequiredSaving: City is required when saving a location
editProfile.overviewDescription: Keep your details accurate and build trust.
editProfile.locationDescription: Set the areas where you are available for work.
editProfile.languagesDescription: Choose all languages you can comfortably use.
editProfile.workDescription: Tell employers what makes you reliable and professional.
editProfile.trustDescription: Complete checks that help employers hire with confidence.
editProfile.benefit2: Increase your chances of being hired
editProfile.benefit3: Help employers find the right match
editProfile.benefit4: Stand out with a complete profile
editProfile.identityDescription: Email is optional. Your phone remains the main account contact.
editProfile.minAgeHint: Workers must be at least {age} years old.
editProfile.contactPrivacyNote: Your contact information is private and only shared after a booking is confirmed.
editProfile.locationDescriptionFull: Choose the area you're usually based in — clients near this area will find you first.
editProfile.languagesDescriptionFull: Choose every language you can comfortably use with clients.
editProfile.bioPlaceholder: Briefly describe your experience, what you do best, and what employers should know about you.
editProfile.workDetailsDescription: These remain optional, but help with better matching.
editProfile.selfReportedNote: Self-reported. No school document is required.
editProfile.trustBadgesDescription: Verification statuses are kept in sync with existing account data.
editProfile.profileComplete: Your profile is complete and ready for employers.
editProfile.almostThere: Almost there. Complete a few more sections.
editProfile.addMoreDetails: Add more details to help employers decide faster.
editProfile.workSectionDescription: Keep it practical, specific, and easy for employers to scan.
